title: Warm up
content: The slide displays images representing Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image suggests a unique aspect or feature of the city.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide features the theme 'An Evolving Nation: A Ride Through China' and includes images of taxis and iconic cityscapes from China. It hints at exploring developments within the country.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines the structure of Session 1: Local Features, Development Strategies, and Outcomes & Positive Impact. It emphasizes investigation and research of city chains.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Cities are matched with their development strategies: Beijing with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide illustrates city development strategies through the perspective of taxi drivers. It underlines each city's strategic focus based on local characteristics for development.
